pi_items.source: No public evidence found; appears to be synthetic test data for the task
Floreant POS official documentation: https://floreant.org/support/installation-backoffice/, confirmed as default secret key for Back Office access

Confirmed via multiple sources: (1) Floreant POS GitHub ReceiptPrintService.java shows RestaurantDAO.getRestaurant() usage; (2) Other tasks in same environment (configure_default_gratuity, update_restaurant_info) reference RESTAURANT table; (3) Export script queries 'SELECT TICKET_FOOTER_MESSAGE FROM RESTAURANT'

Confirmed via multiple sources: (1) Floreant POS GitHub ReceiptPrintService.java (https://github.com/Maiden93/dev-Floreant-POS) shows 'restaurant.getTicketFooterMessage()' method call; (2) Receipt template (ticket-receipt.jrxml) references 'footerMessage' parameter; (3) Export_result.sh script directly queries 'SELECT TICKET_FOOTER_MESSAGE FROM RESTAURANT'

privileged_info_summary: Floreant POS 1.4 build 1707b is a real, open-source point-of-sale system available on SourceForge. The default Back Office PIN is 1111. The RESTAURANT database table exists with a TICKET_FOOTER_MESSAGE column that stores customizable footer text for printed receipts. This feature is accessible through the Configuration → Print tab in the Back Office, as confirmed by successful trajectory execution. The target footer text 'Wi-Fi: DinerGuest / Pass: pancakes24' is synthetic test data created for this task.
